home.heroSubtitle: Discover an exquisite selection of the world's most coveted authentic perfumes, curated for those who define the extraordinary.
home.storyText: We believe a masterpiece fragrance is more than a scent—it is an invisible aura, a lingering memory, and a silent statement of elegance. Luxe Essence was founded on the belief that the finest olfactory artistry should be accessible to true connoisseurs.
home.newsletterSubtitle: Enter your email to receive exclusive invitations and early access to rare arrivals.

about.missionText: At Luxe Essence, we are passionate about connecting people with extraordinary fragrances from the world's most prestigious houses. Every bottle we sell is 100% authentic, sourced directly from authorized distributors.
about.value1Text: Every fragrance is guaranteed 100% original from certified sources.
about.value2Text: We curate only the finest fragrances from the world's most prestigious houses.
about.value3Text: Your satisfaction is our priority. We provide expert guidance and seamless shopping.
